title: Westland Ericaceous High Performance Liquid Plant Food 1 Litre Green
features: Ideal for acid loving plants including rhododendrons and azaleas as well as camellias and blueberries
Enriched with seaweed to strengthen plants from the inside
High Potassium for longer lasting blooms
Magnesium for greener and glossier foliage
An essential iron source to help nourish plants
description: From the manufacturer Westland Ericaceous High Performance Liquid Plant Food Westland Ericaceous High Performance Liquid Plant Food is a specially tailored feed that provides all the essential nutrients that ericaceous plants need to flourish. Whether in containers or in the ground, feed weekly to help prevent disease and for an abundance of stronger, healthier, more vibrant flowers. Perfect for acid loving plants including Rhododendrons, Azaleas, Camellias & Blueberries. Key Benefits Enriched with seaweed to strengthen plants from the inside out High Potassium for longer lasting blooms Magnesium for greener & glossier foliage Westland Ericaceous High Performance Liquid Plant Food Why Use Westland Ericaceous High Performance Liquid Plant Food has been specially tailored, and is rich in seaweed to meet the specific growing needs of acid-loving, lime-hating plants. It helps build plant immunity and resilience for longer lasting, healthier plants. When to Use Apply Westland Ericaceous High Performance Liquid Plant food every 7-14 days from early spring (March) to late summer (August). How to Use 1. Shake bottle well before use. 2. Fill a watering can with 4.5L of water (1 gal). 3. Measure 50ml using the dosing cap and pour the feed into the watering can. 4. Without wetting the foliage, apply around the plant until the soil becomes saturated. What to Expect Nourish Provides an essential source of iron for healthier plants. Flourish Bio-stimulant boosts flowers growth. Health Magnesium creates greener, glossier foliage.
